arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Global Accelerator.

attributes.description: Attributes related to flow logs configuration, including whether flow logs are enabled, the S3 bucket for logs, and the S3 prefix.

dns_name.description: The DNS name associated with the Global Accelerator.

dual_stack_dns_name.description: The dual-stack DNS name that supports both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses.

enabled.description: A boolean indicating whether the Global Accelerator is enabled.

hosted_zone_id.description: The ID of the Route 53 hosted zone associated with the Global Accelerator.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Global Accelerator.

ip_address_type.description: The type of IP addresses used by the Global Accelerator, either IPv4 or dual-stack.

ip_sets.description: A list of IP sets containing IP addresses and their family (IPv4 or IPv6).

name.description: The name of the Global Accelerator.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the Global Accelerator.
